action.reasoning: Observation: Iterations 1 and 3 failed with DDP timeout (rendezvous/client socket) after ~10 min; iteration 2 single-GPU debug worked. Analysis: The timeout likely comes from torchrun hostname resolution issues in the container, or from a subtle code crash causing one rank to exit while others hang. To validate the end-to-end pipeline and get a baseline score as fast as possible, I will first run a lightweight ResNet-50 backbone for only 2 epochs on 4 GPUs. I rewrote train.py from scratch with robust DDP setup, explicit localhost binding (MASTER_ADDR=127.0.0.1), proper DistributedSampler, EMA, and metrics logging. Predict.py now auto-detects the backbone from the checkpoint and handles module. prefixes. Decision: Execute the minimal ResNet-50 run to measure iteration time, verify DDP, and submit eval immediately. Once the pipeline is proven, I will switch to DINOv2 and scale epochs.
